title: Block Overlays
description: Adds Overlays for most blocks over most other blocks. Continuity or OptiFine required
body:
# Block Overlays
This texture pack adds many different block overlays that fit seamlessly into the world, making everything less blocky and more connected.  
A complex hierarchy ensures that no weird overlaps happen and all the overlays feel as immersive as possible.  

Get a quick overview in this video from 9:42 to 11:47:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QVHNhv8FHGo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Requires Continuity or OptiFine

I frequently update the pack to add overlays for new blocks added in Minecraft Updates and to ensure existing overlays are compatible with new blocks.

Have a look at the gallery for images :)

### Credit
If you have any feedback, feel free to join my Discord and let me know.
Make sure to check out my other packs on my Modrinth profile as well :D
